messages.content: If you ever need anything or advice or anything like that definitely reach out! Especially for chat teams

Oh okay. Yeah that would be good to maybe start that up again for sure. Would love to setup a call this week if you have availability. I can arrange a google meet so you can speak to me and my three other partners and we can answer any questions you have

i stopped doing oftv
noup

Oh okay good haha! Yes honestly oftv is great! Do you have a link to your channel? What kind of content are you doing for it? We have in house editing for it too so tends to help focus on just filming when you can!

yes, i do
actually i started with oftv as main traffic source
Also have you set up other Instagram accounts too? Sometimes can help bring in new traffic. Or using trial reels too.
Oftv made a big difference for a few of our creators they had some amazing months because they got recommended or front pages!
Yeah I understand. Are you bringing most your fans in from Instagram? Have you started OFTV?

Yeah I get that. We donât have much turnover haha so we must be doing something right! Most our creators stick with us because weâre really supportive and listen to our creators. Plus our chatters are really good so that helps. So are you trying to chat yourself right now on OF? Howâs your revenue been?
thatâs why i donât like agencies

itâs good but i know it could be better

These are the sort of creators we manage and usually have a 6 month plan for growth. This is a really good example of someone who got two front pages. They didnât have social media until we signed them as well. So it all worked really well for her.

Hey we manage about 22 models across the world right now. Many have large IGâs or YouTube channels! Our percentages change depending on your total revenue. We provide help with a lot of things like OFTV, editing, chatters are amazing, we do leak prevention and take down, and so much more. Would love to hop on a call this upcoming week and we can show your some of our creators and their results. Also go over how we do things! Howâs your account been doing?
what models do you manage and whatâs your commision %?
sure
hi

Hey! Love the content. I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .1%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
